reviews.comment:
Fuera de época. Sin servicio. Que tengan los "servicios" no implica buena atención ni eficiencia. Fui socio y me baje un año antes de ser vitalicio porque ya no era el ACA de antes. Se quedaron en la prehistoria. Hay alternativas superiores y más competitivas en precios.

(Translated by Google)
Outdated. Lacking service. Just because they have the "services" doesn't mean good customer service or efficiency. I was a member and cancelled my membership a year before it became a lifetime membership because it wasn't the ACA it used to be. They're stuck in the Stone Age. There are better and more competitively priced alternatives.

reviewReply.comment:
Perdón no entendemos tenemos todos los servicios ud a que se refiere?
Gracias
